name: Call for Donations: UNLV Basic Needs Program
summary: Are you finishing spring cleaning and looking for a donation spot for your clothing or pantry items? The UNLV Basic Needs Program is seeking donations to support students experiencing basic needs insecurity. Accepted donations include:

name: Tarkanian Way Maintenance Project
summary: Road maintenance is underway on Tarkanian Way around the Thomas & Mack Center (TMC). The project will extend the roadway’s lifespan and improve traffic flow and safety. Work is expected to be completed by the end of June, prior to NBA Summer League events. During...

name: Congratulations to Deborah Seda on Her Retirement!
summary: After 25 years of steadfast service to UNLV, Debi Seda will retire on September 9. Throughout a long and dedicated career at the university, Debi has made a lasting impact across several areas of campus, including Purchasing, the Provost’s Office, the UNLV Foundation, and...

name: UNLV Nursing’s Mary Murray Retires After More Than 20 Years
summary: After more than 20 years of dedicated service, Mary Murray, Administrative Assistant IV, will be retiring from the UNLV School of Nursing. Her last day is June 29. Mary has been a constant presence through years of growth and change at the school, always willing to step up,...

name: Classified Employee of the Month Nominations
summary: Nomination Process If you know a classified employee who deserves an opportunity at this noteworthy award, please submit your nominations by Friday, June 26.

name: Rebel Grounds Open during Summer 2 & 3
summary: Spread the word! Rebels Grounds is opening during Summer Session 2 and Summer Session 3 (June 9 - August 13, 2026). Stop by for an ice-cold latte or a delicious summer tea. Rebel Grounds Summer Hours 8 a.m. to 1 p.m. Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday

name: New UNLV/CSUN Preschool Director
summary: Earlier this week, Chelsie Shurtleff took the helm as the director of the UNLV/CSUN Preschool at the Lynn Bennett Early Childhood Education Center. She is an experienced early childhood education professional and researcher with a bachelor's degree in early childhood...
